items.question_text: Under 8-10-1, the North American ICAO Region services in the _____ CTA are provided with the general oceanic procedures in Chapter 8.
items.explanation: Per 8-10-1, this section covers the North American ICAO Region - Arctic CTA.

items.question_text: Under 8-10-1, the North American ICAO Region - Arctic CTA ATC service follows general Chapter 8 procedures with exceptions prescribed by _____ or letters of agreement.
items.explanation: Per 8-10-1, directives and LOAs may prescribe different procedures.

items.question_text: Under 8-10-2, vertical separation in the Arctic CTA is provided in accordance with Chapter 4, Section _____, and Chapter 8, Section 5.
items.explanation: Per 8-10-2, vertical separation follows Chapter 4, Section 8 and Chapter 8, Section 5.

items.question_text: Under 8-10-3, longitudinal separation in the Arctic CTA follows Chapter 8, Section _____, with Arctic-specific provisions.
Under 8-10-4, lateral separation in the Arctic CTA follows Chapter 8, Section _____, with Arctic-specific provisions.
